content_en: Public figures often associated with cannabis culture include Bob Marley, Snoop Dogg, Willie Nelson, Wiz Khalifa, B-Real, Tommy Chong, Damian Marley, and Seth Rogen.
content_ru: С каннабис-культурой часто связывают Боба Марли, Snoop Dogg, Willie Nelson, Wiz Khalifa, B-Real, Tommy Chong, Damian Marley и Seth Rogen.
